dissent_flag.dissent_reason: Macro neutral due to conflicting gap-up vs risk-off signals; sentiment and session timer bullish on overnight gap and morning window quality

validator_assessment.weakest_link: Overnight gap-up $5.96 (0.80%) dismissed as 'fading' by bearish agents — largest directional signal in dataset
validator_assessment.top_invalidation_scenario: SPY breaks above 748.0 resistance level and holds for 15+ minutes, inverting the entire bearish thesis

risk_assessment.top_risk: Quarterly expiry Friday creates extreme pin risk toward 748.0 and 745.33 levels regardless of directional bias

invalidation.condition: SPY breaks above 748.0 resistance level and holds for 15+ minutes
invalidation.effect: The level_thesis primary bearish scenario inverts. Short-covering would likely trigger as 748.0 was identified as the battle level with 3-star strength. Ribbon would need to flip to confirm new bullish structure.

swarm_predictions.claim: SPY will test 748.0 resistance within first 90 minutes of RTH and fail to break above
swarm_predictions.invalidation: SPY breaks and holds above 748.0 for 15+ minutes

swarm_predictions.claim: VIX will remain in MID regime (16-20) and stay flat to slightly higher given risk-off rotation
swarm_predictions.invalidation: VIX drops below 15.0 within first 60 minutes

swarm_predictions.claim: Ribbon will maintain CLEAN_BEAR structure with fast EMA staying below slow EMA
swarm_predictions.invalidation: Ribbon flips to MIXED or BULL as fast EMA crosses above slow EMA

synthesis_narrative: Bearish consensus (8/12 agents) conflicts with massive overnight gap-up signal ($5.96, 0.80%) that most bearish agents dismissed as 'fading.' The 748.0 resistance level is the battleground - bears expect failure here, but gap-up suggests potential reclaim. XLK underperforming SPY by 0.33% confirms risk-off rotation, but extremely low volume (0.15x) contradicts strong bearish conviction. Quarterly expiry creates pin risk toward key levels regardless of direction.

technical.one_line: CLEAN_BEAR ribbon with 13c spread, price 5c below pivot, mixed bar structure but bearish momentum

macro.one_line: VIX MID regime at 16.41 flat, no events today, gap-up conflicts with risk-off rotation signal

level_thesis.one_line: 748.0 resistance battle level, expect failure and continuation to 745.33 support

internals.one_line: Risk-off rotation with XLK -1.7% leading SPY decline, all sectors negative

validator.top_invalidation: SPY breaks above 748.0 resistance and holds, invalidating bearish thesis
